fmi.note: FMI weather station observations. Returns the 1-hour window ending at t.

osm.note: OpenStreetMap infrastructure via Overpass [date:] filter. Shows which hospitals, roads, bridges, airfields existed at t.

astronomy.note: Sun/moon/twilight — computed locally from orbital mechanics, any date.

fmi_forecast.reason: HARMONIE NWP only produces future forecasts. Use fmi for past data.

starlink.reason: TLE propagation gives current position only; historical not supported.

mml.reason: Static Finnish terrain polygons — no historical API.

mml_contours.reason: Static elevation contours — no historical API.

exposure.reason: Derived from terrain — same as mml.

opencellid.reason: Cell tower database — no historical API.

statfin.note: Annual census data — same data for all t within a calendar year.
